'''yazojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylofucoglucuronan|xylofucoglucuronan]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-z-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylofucoglucuronan|xylofucoglucuronan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yazojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yæzejeth|yæzejeth]] || [[word:yæzejej|yæzejej]] || [[word:yæzejesh|yæzejesh]] || [[word:yæzeje|yæzeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yazozojoth|yazozojoth]] || [[word:yazozojoj|yazozojoj]] || [[word:yazozojosh|yazozojosh]] || [[word:yazozojo|yazozojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yazojoth|yazojoth]] || [[word:yazojoj|yazojoj]] || [[word:yazojosh|yazojosh]] || [[word:yazojo|yazojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yazofjoth|yazofjoth]] || [[word:yazofjoj|yazofjoj]] || [[word:yazofjosh|yazofjosh]] || [[word:yazofjof|yazofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yazojotho|yazojotho]] || [[word:yazojojo|yazojojo]] || [[word:yazojosho|yazojosho]] || [[word:yazojoko|yazojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yazojoth|yazojoth]] || [[word:yazojoj|yazojoj]] || [[word:yazojosh|yazojosh]] || [[word:yazojo|yazojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yazojothol|yazojothol]] || [[word:yazojojol|yazojojol]] || [[word:yazojoshol|yazojoshol]] || [[word:yazojokol|yazojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yazojothotho|yazojothotho]] || [[word:yazojojojo|yazojojojo]] || [[word:yazojoshosho|yazojoshosho]] || [[word:yazojoko|yazojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yazojothon|yazojothon]] || [[word:yazojojon|yazojojon]] || [[word:yazojoshon|yazojoshon]] || [[word:yazojokon|yazojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yazojothoro|yazojothoro]] || [[word:yazojojoro|yazojojoro]] || [[word:yazojoshoro|yazojoshoro]] || [[word:yazojokoro|yazojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
